title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-26
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, checking on the 'greenhouse' of apps. She holds a clipboard to represent the metrics/health checks, surrounded by healthy glowing code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's straw hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's straw hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
